quantum_mechanism_gate.title: Confirm your Quantum Mechanism network is installed and operational

scroll_found.title: Research the Instant Travel scroll at a Research Pedestal

subtitle.text: The previous twelve civilizations built monuments. You built something that works.

description: Ch17 is complete. The game is complete.
You have:
- Survived the world's survival mechanics (Cold Sweat, Thirst, Diet, Sculk, Pressure)
- Explored every dimension (Overworld, Nether, End, True End)
- Defeated every major boss (Barako, Kukulkan, Elder Guardian, Wither, Ender Dragon, Ender Trigon, Scarlet King sealed)
- Built a civilization (MCA, Bountiful, Via Romana, Villager Recruits)
- Mastered every major technology tier (Create, TFMG, Create New Age, Create Teleporters)
- Crafted twelve civilization eyes and opened the portal
- Mastered the highest material tier (Celestisynth Netherite)
- Built instant travel infrastructure
The thirteenth civilization did not fall.
It endured, expanded, and transcended.
The Instant Travel scroll is found in Create Teleporters structure loot
or as a Celestisynth end-tier processing output.
Research it. It is the final formal declaration:
you go where you choose, when you choose.
The mastery age does not end the game.
It ends the guided portion.
Everything after this is yours.
→ Confirm quantum teleporter network is active [check]
→ Research the Instant Travel scroll [check]
→ The Mastery Age begins [command]
